Michael Thompson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated and safety-conscious CDL-A Driver with over 4 years of experience in over-the-road (OTR) and regional transportation. Proven track record of delivering cargo on time while adhering to all safety regulations. Possess a clean MVR and current DOT medical card, with a commitment to maintaining a high level of professionalism and customer satisfaction.

Experience

ABC Freight Lines, Columbus, OH  
CDL-A Driver  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operated 53-foot trailers across regional routes, ensuring timely delivery of goods to various clients.
- Maintained a clean driving record with zero accidents or violations.
- Conducted pre-trip and post-trip inspections to ensure vehicle safety and compliance with DOT regulations.

XYZ Transportation, Dayton, OH  
Regional Driver  
January 2019 - May 2021  
- Managed the transportation of freight throughout the Midwest, averaging 2,500 miles per week.
- Built strong relationships with clients and consistently received positive feedback for service quality.
- Implemented efficient route planning, reducing fuel costs by 15%.

Freight Solutions, Springfield, OH  
Delivery Driver  
March 2017 - December 2018  
- Delivered goods to various locations, ensuring accuracy and timeliness in every shipment.
- Assisted in loading and unloading cargo, maintaining a high level of safety in all operations.

Certifications
- Class A CDL (valid until 2026)  
- DOT Medical Card (current)  

Skills
- Strong knowledge of DOT regulations  
- Excellent time management and route planning  
- Proficient in vehicle maintenance and safety checks  
- Strong communication and customer service skills  

Education
Columbus Community College  
Certificate in Commercial Truck Driving  
Graduated: May 2016
